project_type: Python research prototype - Virtual SIA cognitive agent with concept formation, cognitive economy, and self-improvement
build_system: setuptools via pyproject.toml, no external dependencies beyond pytest
test_framework: pytest with class-based test organization, helper factories at top of each test file
verification_instructions: Run pytest from /projects/sandbox/sia. All 234 existing tests must pass. New tests must pass too.
setup_instructions: Python 3.12 via pyenv already installed. Package installed in editable mode.
environment_constraints: Pure Python, no external dependencies. OPEN_INTERNET network mode.
contribution_requirements: Arabic documentation using the Legitimate Theft template. All new features gated behind bool parameters defaulting to False. Follow existing dataclass patterns for objects.
key_patterns: 1. Core objects in virtual_genesis/core/objects/ as @dataclass(slots=True) with BaseObject parent and .create() classmethod. 2. Runtime modules in virtual_genesis/runtime/<name>/ with service.py or apply.py as main. 3. Pipeline wires features via run_minimal_pipeline with gated bool params. 4. Tests in tests/test_<feature>.py with class-based grouping and helper factories. 5. Thefts documented in Arabic markdown with exact template format.
directory_structure: virtual_genesis/core/objects/ - dataclass domain objects; virtual_genesis/runtime/ - runtime modules (pipeline, anomaly, theory, concept_engine, memory_os, etc.); virtual_genesis/eval/ - evaluation runners/reports; tests/ - pytest tests; root *.md - Arabic documentation
